data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for transitioning from discovery facts to explicit share requests.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aims to validate the requirement of transitioning from discovery facts to explicit share requests. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this specific requirement is satisfied. Instead, the evidence focuses on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, leading to an inconclusive result regarding the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the ability to transition from discovery facts to explicit share requests.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
